reviewer: Anton independent product and trust acceptance agent
scope: Cold-visitor comprehension, value ladder, truth, risk, CTA earning, destination continuity, final handoff and bounded re-review after the data-URI favicon runtime repair.
findings: Cold desktop and mobile observers understand VibeUs and choose the direct public catalog.
Every chapter contributes a new decision value and every repeated destination is re-earned.
Current scale is bounded as a dated 4-project and 4-author snapshot rather than community maturity or a solution library.
All degraded states hide stale proof and preserve a literal recovery route.
The final chapter states public access in human language and leaves catalog beside the optional auth handoff.
The favicon repair is non-visible, preserves the accepted decision spine and rebinds Human-QA to the current source snapshot.
residuals: The small demo-heavy catalog limits market trust but is not disguised by the landing.
Post-auth actions remain unproven and therefore unpromised.
Human-QA is qualitative proxy evidence, not population or conversion evidence.
Public routes and dated screenshots are volatile.
Assistive-technology participant testing is not part of this proof set.
